skills.name: devo-alert
skills.description: Devo Alert management — Flow/Pilot/Cockpit architecture, alert context DB schema, period staggering (anti-flooding), TAPU token manager, cross-domain injection, XSOAR duplicate alert fix.
prompts: Troubleshoot alert not firing or duplicating
Configure period staggering to prevent alert flooding
Manage alert context in MySQL (logtrust/pilot schema)
Manage TAPU token for cross-domain injection
